chunks.text: Dear Mrs. Nuray, Our purpose in writing you this message is to inform you about the AZ-Volunteer platform created for people interested in volunteer activities. The platform developed by us brings together various volunteering projects operating in Azerbaijan, giving users the opportunity to easily choose projects that suit their interests and participate in these projects. Considering that you are open to volunteer activities on your LinkedIn profile, we invite you to register on our platform and familiarize yourself with the available opportunities: https://az-volunteer.vercel.app/ If you would like more information about the platform, we are happy to provide you with detailed information. We thank you in advance for your cooperation and wish you success in your activities. Sincerely, Nizami Malikov AZ-Volunteer Platform
